creator: roger@wilcis.com
text:
I ran into this issue in the past couple of days on an aarch64 install of 14-STABLE running in a Mac M2 VM. 

Bear continues spawning new processes, it eventually fails and core dumps, but that takes a significant amount of time. In searching for possible causes I found the below link. There are good details in the post as to the reasons and when it occurred, please refer to the issue on GitHub for details.

https://github.com/rizsotto/Bear/issues/557

It doesn't look like it has been reported here at this point.

Thank you,
Roger
